text.title: Outsource PR Etiquette Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-outsource-pr-etiquette.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "pr_id": "myorg/payments#482", "intent": "fix", "diff_loc": 132, "reviewer": "alice", "repro_steps": [ "git fetch origin pr/482", "git checkout pr/482", "pytest tests/test_refund.py -k flaky" ], "evidence_links": [ "https://gist.github.com/myorg/before.log", "https://gist.github.com/myorg/after.log" ], "rollback": "git revert <sha> on main; no DB changes." }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: missing intent/reviewer/repro_steps/evidence_links/rollback; diff_loc>400 without waiver_reason.
